strengths: Proficient in Python for ETL and modeling
Dashboarding with Power BI and Tableau
Proven measurable impact (e.g., 40% time reduction, 300% acquisition)
Experience with cloud data platforms (BigQuery, Snowflake, AWS S3)
weaknesses: No explicit A/B testing leadership experience
Limited direct paid-search or social ads hands-on
Short total years in analytics role (~2+ years)
No clear mentoring or senior title alignment
improvement_bullets: Led A/B testing initiatives for marketing campaigns, analyzing experimental results to inform strategic decisions and drive improved customer acquisition, contributing to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months.
Developed and implemented ETL pipelines using Python and SQL to integrate data from multiple sources, including APIs and PostgreSQL databases, for use in advanced analytics and reporting.
Managed documentation and ticket tracking using JIRA and Confluence to ensure team alignment and on-time project delivery, optimizing collaborative workflows for software development.

Leveraged advanced Excel skills, including Pivot Tables and VLOOKUP, alongside Power BI and Tableau, to create interactive dashboards that improved KPI visibility and reduced data processing time by 40%.

Analyzed large datasets (e.g., 2M+ row loan portfolio, 250K+ row arrest data) to identify key characteristics and patterns, enabling segmentation and informing strategic recommendations for business and policy initiatives.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

i am excited to submit my application for the Senior Data Analyst (Bangkok Based) opportunity with Agoda. i am interested in this opportunity because Agoda's mission to bridge the world through travel deeply resonates with my passion for exploration and my belief in the power of data to enhance user experiences.

what interests me about working for Agoda is its data-driven culture and commitment to innovation, which excites, inspires, and intrigues me because it aligns perfectly with my own professional philosophy. i believe my advanced statistical and analytical skills and my expertise in data visualization would make me a strong candidate for this role.

during my professional career, i have approached problems with a focus on extracting actionable insights from complex datasets. in fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, i developed time series models to identify high-value customer segments; targeted marketing initiatives informed by these models contributed to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months.

ultimately, i know that the Senior Data Analyst role at Agoda would allow me to bring my advanced statistical and analytical skills to optimizing marketing programs that improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers.

additionally, my experience as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters Cleaning Services enabled me to develop my dashboarding and reporting skills. i developed interactive Power BI dashboards to replace manual reporting, improving KPI visibility, reducing data processing time by 40%, and accelerating executive decision-making.

i’m excited by the opportunity to use my expertise in data visualization in working on the experimental analysis of search and display campaigns at Agoda. i know that my advanced statistical and analytical skills and my expertise in data visualization align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Data Analyst role.

i would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. thank you for your time and consideration. i look forward to hearing from you soon.

warm regards,
Justin Miller
